Id1.text: Part of Colombian cuisine, Bandeja paisa (which has kidney beans as one of the ingredients), comes from Antioquia Department area.

Id2.text: Bandeja paisa, which contains kidney beans, is a traditional dish found in the Antioquia Department of Colombia.

Id3.text: Kidney beans are an ingredient of Bandeja paisa which is a Colombian dish from the Antioquia department.
